name: ctx-pack
description: Analyze code dependencies and auto-select the most relevant files to pack into a context bundle within a token budget.
intent_triggers: 幫我把專案打包成上下文
自動追蹤依賴並挑選相關檔案
把 main.py 相關的程式碼打包
生成不超過 8000 tokens 的上下文包
複製打包結果到剪貼簿
pack the project into a context bundle
copy the packed context to clipboard
include test files in the context pack
sort files by relevance to the query
幫我依重要性排序並打包程式碼

entry.description: Entry file path(s) to start dependency tracing

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens for the context pack

depth.description: Dependency depth limit (1 for direct only)

include_tests.description: Include test files in the pack

strategy.description: Sorting strategy: auto, importance, or relevance

examples.intent: 以 main.py 為起點自動打包
依查詢相關性排序打包
examples.invocation: ctx-pack src/main.py --strategy relevance --query "使用者登入邏輯"

error_codes.2: Token limit too small to include any file
